calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Consolidated with Case No. 406014 Pacatte vs. Sebastian, and Case No. 411562 McAteer vs. Sebastian. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders consolidated cases dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Susan Lee. (212)

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-21-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Romy Barulich.
Riley M. Beckett, Esq. for Petitioner Kevin Redfern guardian ad litem for Robert Redfern a minor Claimant.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants the compromise as follows:
Compromise: $25,000.00 to be deposited into an interest bearing trust account in Great Britian in the name of the Petitioner as trustee for the claimant until the minor attains the age of 18 years.
Order signed in open court.

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-16-2003 Continued To Oct-21-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: V. Mack/S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Riley M. Beckett, Esq. for Plaintiff/Guardian ad litem, Kevin Redfern.
The Court continued this matter to Oct. 23, 2003 at 09:00 a.m. for counsel to obtains an order Appointing guardian ad litem for the minor.
